See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 24380 => 'Orange', 24381 => 'Vodacom', 24382 => 'Vodacom', 24383 => 'Vodacom', 24384 => 'Orange', 24385 => 'Orange', 24386 => 'Vodacom', 24388 => 'Yozma Timeturns sprl -YTT', 24389 => 'Orange', 24390 => 'Africell', 24391 => 'Africell', 24397 => 'Airtel', 24398 => 'Airtel', 24399 => 'Airtel', ];
